questions.question: Given a context-free grammar G = (V, Σ, P, S) with a regular language L(G) generated by it. What is the closure property associated with L(G)?
questions.hint: A grammar is said to be *context-free*

questions.question: A finite automaton M = (Q, Σ, δ, q0, F) recognizes the regular language L(M). Determine the type of equivalence between M and M'. If M and M' are *equivalent*, what does it mean? If M and M'' are *equivalent*, what does it mean?
questions.hint: Two finite automata are said to be *equivalent*

questions.question: Let L1 = a*b* and L2 = a*b. Determine which of the following properties will be preserved when we minimize the automata for L1 and L2?
